title: Sudoku Quest for Kids
description: A kid-friendly sudoku: 4×4 starter → 6×6 grower → 9×9 classic, 30 levels with three-star scoring, pencil notes, hints and undo.

game.tips: Tips: arrow keys move, number keys fill the cell, press N to toggle pencil/confirm, Backspace clears. 3 stars = no errors, no hints!
